en_title: Ex-Modern Warfare Creative Strategist Launches New Studio, Pushing Back Against Live Service Trends
cn_title: 前《现代战争》创意策划成立新工作室，反击服务型游戏潮流
subtitle: 「做，否则死」
opus_summary: 前Infinity Ward创意策划Robert Bowling成立新工作室//18.bravo，首作是一款含单人剧情和PvP的FPS。工作室反对服务型游戏模式，并承诺若关闭将开源资产和代码。

paragraphs.en: Robert Bowling, the former creative strategist of Infinity Ward during the original Modern Warfare trilogy , is launching a new studio that pushes back against destructive gaming trends.
paragraphs.cn: Robert Bowling曾在原版《现代战争》三部曲时期担任Infinity Ward创意策划，如今他正成立一家新工作室，反击破坏性的游戏行业趋势。

paragraphs.en: Bowling announced his new studio, known as //18.bravo, and revealed that his new team will be working to radically rethink the way modern games are made. Bowling confirmed that while they will have an online component to their game, it will not be "live service." The goal is to make a game that can be enjoyed, even if the studio behind it collapses.
paragraphs.cn: Bowling公布了自己的新工作室//18.bravo，并透露新团队将彻底重新思考现代游戏的制作方式。Bowling确认，虽然他们的游戏会有在线组件，但它不会是「服务型游戏」。目标是做出一款即使背后的工作室倒闭，也仍能被玩家享受的游戏。

paragraphs.en: "While we will support dedicated servers during our peak / launch periods, the foundation of the game is focused around supporting 'forever play,' which means optimized P2P architecture that allows the community to play together even if the company moves on," said Bowling.
paragraphs.cn: Bowling表示：「虽然我们会在高峰期/首发期支持专用服务器，但游戏的基础会围绕‘永久游玩’展开，也就是优化后的P2P架构，让社区即使在公司离开后也能一起游玩。」

paragraphs.en: He confirmed exclusively to IGN that //18.bravo's first game will be a first-person shooter with a single-player narrative and PvP multiplayer.
paragraphs.cn: 他向IGN独家确认，//18.bravo的首款游戏将是一款第一人称射击游戏，包含单人叙事和PvP多人模式。

paragraphs.en: “Video games are over commercialized," Bowling told us. "As an industry, we’ve neglected our players and abused our staff to focus on ever increasing profits projections. Live service is killing development teams, unending content treadmills of [free-to-play] gaming are draining players, and the AAA studio system has failed. It’s time for a radically different approach, and we’re doing it or will die trying.”
paragraphs.cn: Bowling告诉我们：「电子游戏已经被过度商业化。作为一个行业，我们忽视了玩家，也虐待了员工，只为追逐不断增长的利润预期。服务型游戏正在杀死开发团队，免费游戏无尽的内容跑步机正在榨干玩家，AAA工作室体系已经失败。是时候采用一种彻底不同的方法了，我们要么做到，要么死在尝试中。」

paragraphs.en: //18.bravo is also taking a unique approach to rewarding those who work on the game. Leadership compensation will be tied to employee success, there will be a royalty program for staff, and the studio will also offer profit sharing opportunities for external talent such as voice actors, mocap performers, and contractors.
paragraphs.cn: //18.bravo还会用一种独特方式奖励参与游戏开发的人。管理层薪酬将与员工成功挂钩，员工会有版税计划，工作室也会为配音演员、动捕演员和承包商等外部人才提供利润分享机会。

paragraphs.en: Additionally, Bowling confirmed via his LinkedIn post that the studio will make its assets and code open source if the studio ever shuts down, ensuring that the game won't evaporate out of existence if the studio has to close its doors.
paragraphs.cn: 此外，Bowling通过自己的LinkedIn帖子确认，如果工作室有朝一日关闭，它将开源资产和代码，确保这款游戏不会因为工作室关门而从世界上蒸发。

paragraphs.en: "It is written into our bylaws that if our studio shuts down, our assets, code, and everything required to extend the game (except 3rd party integrations and licensed music) will become open source by default," said Bowling. "Most importantly, we will be releasing all the legal paperwork and processes that make this possible publicly so the model can be replicated easily and at low cost to those who decide to mimic the model."
paragraphs.cn: Bowling表示：「我们的章程中写明，如果工作室关闭，我们的资产、代码，以及扩展游戏所需的一切（第三方集成和授权音乐除外）都将默认开源。最重要的是，我们会公开发布实现这一点所需的所有法律文件和流程，让决定模仿这种模式的人能够轻松、低成本地复制它。」

paragraphs.en: Bowling's comments and mission statement come during a tumultuous time in the gaming industry. Bungie just laid off nearly half of its studio after winding down support on Destiny 2, and Xbox is preparing to execute massive cuts , which will likely result in studio closures and game cancellations. Microsoft is reportedly considering cancelling Marvel's Blade in addition to .
paragraphs.cn: Bowling的评论和使命声明出现于游戏行业动荡时期。Bungie刚刚在逐步停止支持《命运2》后裁掉了近一半工作室员工，XBOX也准备执行大规模裁员，这很可能导致工作室关闭和游戏取消。据报道，微软还在考虑取消《漫威刀锋战士》。
